register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Fill in your details to get started
register.name: Full Name
register.recovery_help: Already have an account but can’t access it?

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgot_password.advanced_recovery_link: Lost email or MFA too? Go to advanced recovery

logout.success: You have been signed out successfully.

email.verify_greeting: Hi :name, please verify your email by clicking the link below:
email.reset_greeting: Hi :name, you requested a password reset. Click the link below:
email.reset_ignore: If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.password_min: Password must be at least :min characters.
validation.password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
validation.password_number: Password must contain at least one number.
validation.password_symbol: Password must contain at least one symbol.
validation.password_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
validation.password_common: Password is too common. Please choose a less predictable password.

messages.account_inactive: Your account has not been activated yet. Please check your email for the activation link.
messages.register_success: Account created. Please check your email to verify your account.
messages.email_exists: This email address is already registered.
messages.verify_success: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
messages.verify_invalid: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
messages.password_reset_sent: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent.
messages.password_reset_success: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
messages.reset_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
messages.social_not_configured: This social login is not configured.
messages.social_error: Social login failed. Please try again.
messages.social_no_email: We could not retrieve your email from this provider. Please register with email instead.
messages.email_not_verified: Please verify your email address before signing in. Check your inbox for the verification link.

mfa.globally_disabled: Two-factor authentication is not enabled for this application.
mfa.setup_subtitle: Protect your account with an authenticator app
mfa.setup_forced_notice: Two-factor authentication is required by your organisation. Please set it up to continue.
mfa.challenge_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a backup code
mfa.already_enabled: Two-factor authentication is enabled on your account.
mfa.step1: Download an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Aegis, Authy).
mfa.step2: Scan the QR code below with your app.
mfa.step3: Enter the 6-digit code from the app to confirm.
mfa.manual_entry: Can't scan? Enter this code manually
mfa.code_hint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app; 000-000 is accepted too.
mfa.challenge_hint: Use the 6-digit authenticator code, 000-000 format, or a backup code like XXXX-XXXX.
mfa.disable_hint: To disable two-factor authentication, confirm your current password.
mfa.disable_password_label: Confirm your password to disable MFA
mfa.backup_codes_hint: Store these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
mfa.backup_codes_notice: Store these codes somewhere safe. Each can only be used once.
mfa.invalid_code: The code you entered is invalid or has expired. Please try again.
mfa.setup_expired: Your setup session has expired. Please start again.
mfa.wrong_password: The password you entered is incorrect.
mfa.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
mfa.invalid_code_format: Use a 6-digit code, 000-000 format, or a backup code such as XXXX-XXXX.
mfa.lost_access_link: I lost access to my MFA

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: Paste the verification token from your email when the activation link cannot be opened directly.
verify.token_hint: Use the complete 64-character hexadecimal token exactly as received.
verify.token_invalid_format: The verification token must be exactly 64 hexadecimal characters.
